name: NSG Allows Admin Ports from Internet
description: Network Security Group allows SSH (22) or RDP (3389) access from any source (Internet)
conditions: security_rules ANY (direction == 'Inbound' AND access == 'Allow' AND source_address_prefix IN ('*', 'Internet', '0.0.0.0/0') AND destination_port_range IN ('22', '3389', '*'))
remediation: Restrict source addresses to specific IPs or ranges. Use Azure Bastion for secure RDP/SSH access. Implement Just-in-Time VM access.
